title: Better Horizons
description: A Small Modpack Made To Make Minecraft Look, Sound, And Act Better in various Client Side ways
body:
### THIS IS IN TESTING!

Better Horizons Is A Small Modpack Designed to make minecraft look, Sound, And Act Better while trying its best to keep Preformance High.

-----

Better Horizons Is designed to Try Keep Visuals Up While Keeping Preformance to a maxium, It Inculdes almost Endless Render distance Thanks to distant Horizons, 3 Included Shaders, And An Included Map With Pre Rendered distant Horizon Chunks

-----
Join The 3 Pixels [Discord](https://discord.gg/eEGxP332Ez) Server!

-----

Upwards Of 900 FPS With My Hardware Without Shaders


# FPS Counts And Hardware

AMD Ryzen 7 3700X, AMD Radeon 7600 8 Gb, 16 gbs of ram, 6096 Alocated to MC
